_comment: Shared build configuration for all build scripts. Edit this file to add/remove content directories.

sitemap._comment: Published sitemap covers the default language only. 'exclude' removes URLs whose path contains 'match' entirely. 'downrank' lowers <priority> for URLs whose path contains 'match' (first matching rule wins). Exclude is applied first.

contentDirectories._comment: Directories that contain translatable content (markdown and HTML files)

sharedDirectories._comment: Directories that are shared across languages (assets, API docs). Not translated.

rootFiles._comment: Root-level files that should be copied/localized
